title: M.Y Interlocking Foam Play Mat - 29x29cm Thick, Multi Colour Soft EVA Baby Floor Tiles
features: 29x29cm Foam Playmats - The Interlocking Mats can be secured together to add a protective layer to flooring in playrooms, living rooms and even outdoors
Soft & Safe - Keep young children safe from knocks and bangs whilst they play by providing a soft and padded surface.
Designed to fit your space - the 29x29cm mats can be interconnected in several different ways to suit the room or space.
Wide Coverage - 1 pack will cover an area of 0.75 Square Meters. Add more packs to cover more space or lay in a different formation
Made for Soft Play -The Foam EVA construction is a soft, non-toxic surface for kids to play on and wipe clean after any spills or accidents.
description: Product Description Perfect for home play spaces Interlocking Foam Play Mats Keep young children safe from knocks and bangs while they play. The interlocking mats can be configured in multiple different ways to best suit your space. Add more play mats to cover a larger area. Provide your little ones with a comfortable play space that's more forgiving than a hard floor. Previous page Safe EVA Foam Constructed out of non-toxic foam, the mats provide a soft, padded surface suitable for ages 3+ Fun Pastel Colours Each 9 pack contains a random assortment of pastel colours - put them together to make fun patterns. Simple Interlocking The easy to assemble mats slot together like puzzle pieces, arrange them to suit your space. Easy to Clean A water resistant, wipe clean surface makes cleaning stress free for any spills or accidents.
